tests.purpose: generator accepts only the pinned WAD plus approved definitions/closure and an explicit output directory
two clean temporary-directory generations have byte-identical paths, bytes and canonical SQL tree hashes
every generated document is ASCII, LF-only, final-LF, deterministic and free of volatile values
all SQL insert statements and manifest file records contain no more than 500 rows
manifest pins IWAD/map identity and confines map ingestion to E1M1
manifest and generated dataset rows match every literal Section 1.1 map and palette/colormap count
manifest reproduces exact E1M1 vertex bounds and player-one spawn facts
each used source records directory index/name/occurrence/offset/size/SHA-256 and last-occurrence selection
map marker, ten map lump hashes and byte sizes match independent literal probes
PLAYPAL/COLORMAP/PNAMES/TEXTURE directory provenance and hashes match independent probes
manifest asset keys equal the approved E1M1 closure with no missing, duplicate or unrelated asset
every asset source lump resolves with exact last-occurrence hash and closure source order
raw and decoded asset hashes match independent WAD decoding, including literal hash probes
hand-recorded palette, colormap, flat, composed wall, UI and transparent sprite texels match manifest and seed
SQL contains exactly the manifest-declared source and asset provenance row closure
manifest lists every and only generated SQL file with byte hash, dataset, rows and batch metadata
approved evaluator integrity baselines remain byte-identical and production cannot read evaluator artifacts
fourteen semantic mutations map to named visible tests and are required to be killed
